positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, rendered in deep midnight blues, iridescent violets, and accents of glowing gold. The owl is depicted with an open, watchful stance, its feathers creating complex, fractal-like patterns that interact with constellations and swirling nebulae in the background. Use a neo-art nouveau stained-glass aesthetic combined with cosmic sci-fi elements. The composition must be clean, high-contrast, and centered, making the owl and moon the dominant, crisp silhouettes. Perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Dramatic, soft rim lighting highlighting the edges of the feathers and the glowing gold accents. Intricate details, smooth vector quality, high resolution.
negative: blurry, low quality, amateur, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, poorly drawn, disfigured, cartoon, graffiti, messy
